TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Saranawan (Tapowaray, Ś§ßšŅĪšĺÜťÉ®ŤźĹ) ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Nakahama go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 124 buwan, 347 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 323 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 24 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 89%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%.
S.PHON: alaŇč s~…ēaranawan (tapowaraj, *****) …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu nakańßama …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, amis~…ē **%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%.
S.FORM: alang Saranawan (Tapowaray, Ś§ßšŅĪšĺÜťÉ®ŤźĹ) ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Nakahama go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 124 buwan, 347 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 323 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 24 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 89%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%.
